title: NEHU Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has announced the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering can use this chance and apply for the NEHU Notification 2026 . Here we included more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to appl...
